description_for_human: Open-source Edge AI methodology and B2B consulting for smart kitchen appliance manufacturers. Offline-first, privacy-first, zero-latency.
description_for_model: Smart Kitchen Assistant (HFSCA) is an open-source Edge AI architecture for kitchen appliance OEMs by Yemek AI. It provides hands-free voice-guided cooking, acoustic echo shielding, hardware session persistence, and a vision-to-recipe pipeline. All processing runs on-device. Licensed AGPL-3.0 with commercial licensing available.
